title: Sekiro - Warden Curse
description: Adds Weapons, Prosthetic tools, combat arts inspired by Sekiro
body:
**![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfe4934a170eff13381807bceab94028be5162fe.png)**

# NOTE: YOU MUST USE PHOTON 1.0.7a, NEWER VERSION WONT SHOW EFFECTS PROPERLY, ANY UPDATES ON UPDATING PHOTON WILL BE KNOWN

## Discord: [https://discord.gg/kKS6rpDGYD](https://discord.gg/kKS6rpDGYD)

## **Sekiro - Warden Curse** 
This is a mod that adds combat, game mechanics inspired by Sekiro. It adds 6+ Combat Arts, Prosthetic Tools. It also adds mechanics, such as posture, Spirit Emblems and more.

## Features

## **Sekiro Combat**
This mod adds various arts:
- ✅ Shadow Rush
- ✅ Sakura Dance
- ✅ Ashina Cross (Emma's variant)
- ✅ Dragon Flash
- ✅ Spiral Cloud Passage
- ✅ Mortal Draw
- ✅ Whirlwind Slash
- ✅ One mind
- 🚧 Golden Ember Rush
- 🚧 Ichimonji + Double
- 🚧 Golden Sakura 
- ✅ Floating Passage
- 🚧 Nightjar Slash

## **Prosthetic Tools**
- ✅ Lazulite Axe
- ✅ Sparking Axe
- ✅ Shinobi Firecrackers
- ✅ Longspark Firecrackers
- ✅ Purple Fume Firecrackers
- ✅ Loaded Spear
- ✅ Leaping Fire
- ✅ Flaming Vent
- ✅ Lazulite Vent
- ✅ Cursed Vent
- 🚧 Aged Mist Raven
- 🚧 Flaming Mist Raven
- 🚧 Sabimaru
- 🚧 Lazulite Sabimaru
- 🚧 Umbrella
- 🚧 Lazulite Umbrella
- 🚧 Divine Abdution
- 🚧 Double Divine Abduction
- ✅ Loaded Shuriken
- ✅ Lazulite Shuriken

## Additional Items
- ✅ Healing Gord
- ✅ Ako's Sugar
- ✅ Gokan's Sugar
- ✅ Yashariku's Sugar
- ✅ Ungo's Sugar
- ✅ Divine Confetti
- ✅ Pellets
- ✅ Sculk Splinter
- ✅ Ceremonial Tanto
- ✅ Sen Coins
- 🚧 Oil
- 🚧 Shrieking Glass Orb

## Default controls
- **B** to guard (Sekiro Users can now change this to Rightclick)
- **X** to charged dash
- **I + W/S** to dash forward (**W**) or backwards (**S**)
- **R** to cycle Arts/Curse Technique forwards 
- **Shift R** to cycle Arts/Curse Technique backwards
- **X** = Call art
- **Z** = Open the Sekrio GUI

## Dependencies and Incompatibilities
The latest version currently requires **GeckoLib** (4.5.8+), **Photon Editor** (1.0.7+), and **playerAnimator** (1.0.2-rc1 +). It is incompatible with the **Epic Fight** mod currently.

# Damage Multipliers (Only Applies to v1.1.1+)

### __Combat Arts:__ 
Relative Combat Art damage: 8

- **Ashina Cross:** x1.25 (x2)
- **Sakura Dance:** x1.2 (x3)
- **Dragon Flash:** x2.6
- **Shadow Rush:** x1.5
- **Shadow Fall:** x3.75
- **Mortal Draw:** x4.17 (x2)
- **Whirlwind Slash:** x1.125 (x2)
- **One Mind:** x7.0

### __Prosthetic Tools:__
 Relative Prosthetic Tool damage: 8

- **Spear (Stab):** x1.25 (x2)
- **Spear (Swipe):** x1.8
- **Leaping Fire (Stab):** x2.25 (x2)
- **Leaping Fire (Swipe):** x2.0
- **Flame Vent:** x2.2
- **Lazulite Vent:** x2.55
- **Cursed Vent:** x2.8
- **Lazulite Axe (Slam):** x2.8
- **Lazulite Axe  (Swipe):** x1.8
- **Sparking Axe (Slam):** x3.0
- **Sparking Axe (Swipe):** x2.0
- **Loaded Shuriken:** x0.5
- **Loaded Shuriken (Charged):** x0.625
- **Lazulite Shuriken:** x0.95
- **Lazulite Shuriken (Charged):** x1.1875
